bottom_line: S01's CSS was added to tailwind.src.css but never reached styles.css — the fix cycle resolved it, but the CLAUDE.md convention about 'run make css after Tailwind changes' is insufficient when the Tailwind CLI cannot run, causing a preventable FAIL→fix cycle on S05.
coverage_notes: Read S01-S05 run logs in full (smallest log: 18 lines; largest: 1196 lines). No log exceeded 1 MB. All step logs read in full. DB telemetry: full.

findings.title: make css is a no-op; CLAUDE.md convention is insufficient when Tailwind CLI cannot run
findings.recommendation: Add a CLAUDE.md Critical Rule: 'If make css produces Nothing to be done or has no rule body, append CSS rules directly to dashboard/static/styles.css — plain CSS is deployable as-is. Do NOT wait for S05 to discover this.'
evidence: .worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S01_run1.log:392 — $ make css → make: Nothing to be done for 'css'
.worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S05_run1.log:256 — make css target has no actual rule body
.worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S05_fix1.log:28-50 — MODULE_NOT_FOUND postcss-selector-parser → fix appended CSS directly to styles.css
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add克劳 Claude.md Critical Rule: if make css fails or is no-op, append CSS directly to dashboard/static/styles.css; analyzed in I-00067 (see ai-dev/active/I-00067/reports/I-00067_self_assess_report.md). Target file: CLAUDE.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S01 spent 3 runs correcting test location and over-broad assertions
findings.recommendation: S01 prompt template should specify: (1) tests for dashboard template features belong in tests/dashboard/, (2) CSS class assertions should search for class attributes (class="classname") not raw class name strings to avoid false positives from JS strings.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S01_run1.log:42 — fixture 'client' not found (test placed in tests/integration/ instead of tests/dashboard/)
.worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S01_run1.log:498 — activity-message-truncated found in JS string selector, not HTML element
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add test-location and assertion-scoping guidance to Issue Design Template; analyzed in I-00067 (see ai-dev/active/I-00067/reports/I-00067_self_assess_report.md). Target file: templates/design/Issue_Design_Template.md or ai-dev/templates/Issue_Design_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S05 fix cycle correctly identified Tailwind CLI broken and used direct-append strategy
findings.recommendation: Document in docs/IW_AI_Core_Tech_Stack.md or worktree_compose.py that node_modules may be incomplete in worktrees (postcss-selector-parser missing), and the direct-append strategy works when Tailwind CLI cannot run.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S05_fix1.log:28-50 — Cannot find module postcss-selector-parser → fix cycle correctly falls back to appending CSS to styles.css
.worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S05_fix1.log:66 — CSS appended; 7 tests pass; lint passes
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Document Tailwind CLI fallback strategy in IW AI Core Tech Stack docs; analyzed in I-00067 (see ai-dev/active/I-00067/reports/I-00067_self_assess_report.md). Target file: docs/IW_AI_Core_Tech_Stack.md. Effort: M.

findings.title: Test assertion fragile for HTML-escaped quotes in data-full-text attribute
findings.recommendation: Replace f'data-full-text="{long_msg}"' in html with html.escape(long_msg) or a regex-based check to avoid false negatives for messages containing double-quote characters.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S02_run1.log:114-116 — assertion searches for unescaped quote in HTML attribute; passes coincidentally since long_msg=E*200 has no quotes
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Fix fragile data-full-text test assertion using html.escape; analyzed in I-00067 (see ai-dev/active/I-00067/reports/I-00067_self_assess_report.md). Target file: tests/dashboard/test_i00067_recent_activity_truncation.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: LiveDbConnectionRefusedError ERROR-level noise in all dashboard test logs
findings.recommendation: Suppress or downgrade LiveDbConnectionRefusedError in test context — it is an expected guard that does not block tests and clutters output.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S01_run1.log:189 — alembic guard check failed at startup; continuing (ERROR level)
.worktrees/I-00067/ai-dev/logs/I-00067_S02_run1.log:207 — same pattern across every test run log
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Downgrade LiveDbConnectionRefusedError to DEBUG/WARNING in test context; analyzed in I-00067 (see ai-dev/active/I-00067/reports/I-00067_self_assess_report.md). Target file: dashboard/app.py or orch/db/live_db_guard.py. Effort: S.
